shared.noProfileDescription: This account isn't linked to a provider listing yet.

badges.longWaitTitle: This patient arrived and left after a long wait. It counts against your waiting time, not against them.
badges.overCapacityTitle: Booked beyond your comfort limit — the patient accepted a longer wait.

dashboard.averageWaitHint: From what patients report in reviews
dashboard.bookingsChartDescription: Monthly bookings against cancellations, last 12 months
dashboard.chartsEmptyDescription: Your bookings and revenue are not reported per month yet, so there is nothing to plot.
dashboard.todayEmptyDescription: You have no appointments scheduled for today.
dashboard.visitsServed: {count, plural, =0 {No visits served yet} one {# visit served} other {# visits served}}

bookings.emptyDescription: Bookings appear here as patients make them.
bookings.missedAlertTitle: What counts as a missed visit
bookings.missedAlertBody: A missed visit means the patient never arrived. A patient who came, waited a long time and left is not a missed visit — that shows up here as “Left after a long wait” and counts against your waiting time, not against them.
bookings.recordMissedHint: The patient did not arrive at all. Someone who arrived and left after a long wait is not a missed visit.
bookings.recordMissedDisabledHint: A missed visit can only be recorded once the session has ended — until then the patient may still be waiting.
bookings.cancelDescription: {name}'s appointment on {date} at {time} will be cancelled on your behalf.
bookings.cancelConsequences: Any booking fee paid is refunded in full, automatically — the patient is never out of pocket for a cancellation you caused. Provider-initiated cancellations are tracked and affect your standing on the platform.
bookings.toastCancelled: Booking cancelled — the patient has been notified and refunded.
bookings.toastRefunded: Refund completed and returned to the patient.

reasonDialog.label: Reason
reasonDialog.tooShort: Write at least a few words — the patient is shown this.
reasonDialog.willSee: The patient will see this in their cancellation notice.

session.dialogDescription: Use this when you cannot run a session at all — illness, an emergency, a closure. Every patient in it is cancelled and refunded.
session.nothingDescription: You have no upcoming sessions with patients booked into them.
session.pickPlaceholder: Pick the session you cannot run
session.confirmTitle: Cancel this session for {count, plural, =0 {no patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}}?
session.notMoved: Every patient is notified straight away and rebooks themselves. They are not moved to another session: that would overload it and leave people unsure of their time.
session.success: Session cancelled — {count, plural, =0 {no patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}} notified and refunded in full.

slot.dialogDescription: Use this when you cannot run a slot at all — a breakdown, an emergency, a closure. Every patient in it is cancelled and refunded.
slot.nothingDescription: You have no upcoming slots with patients booked into them.
slot.pickPlaceholder: Pick the slot you cannot run
slot.confirmTitle: Cancel this slot for {count, plural, =0 {no patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}}?
slot.notMoved: Every patient is notified straight away and rebooks themselves. They are not moved to another slot: that would overload it and leave people unsure of their time.
slot.success: Slot cancelled — {count, plural, =0 {no patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}} notified and refunded in full.

cancelSession.option: {date} · {time} · {branch} — {count, plural, =0 {no patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}}
cancelSession.affected: {count, plural, =0 {No patients} one {# patient} other {# patients}} affected
cancelSession.allCancelled: {count, plural, one {The booking is} other {All # bookings are}} cancelled on your behalf, and any booking fee paid is refunded in full — automatically.
cancelSession.standing: Provider-initiated cancellations are tracked and affect your standing on the platform.
cancelSession.confirmDescription: {date} at {time}, {branch}. Everyone booked in is cancelled and refunded in full, and this counts against your standing.
cancelSession.reasonPlaceholder: I'm unwell and the clinic is closed this evening.

schedule.branchHint: Each branch keeps its own working hours, capacity and services — editing here changes {branch} only.
schedule.noBranchesDescription: Schedules live on branches. Contact the MedPoint team to add your first branch.
schedule.workingHoursDescriptionSession: Each working day is one session. Patients join it and receive a queue number.
schedule.workingHoursDescriptionSlot: Slots are generated from these windows, minus your breaks.
schedule.limitsAlertBody: A comfort limit is a soft one: you can knowingly see one more patient — it just means a longer evening, and the patient is warned about the wait before they take the place. A strict limit is physical — how many scans a machine can do, say — and is never exceeded, even when two patients try to take the last place at once.
schedule.capacityBadgeSession: Session capacity: {count, plural, one {# patient} other {# patients}}
schedule.slotHintSession: Used to estimate when each queue number will be seen.
schedule.slotHintSlot: The gap between one appointment and the next.
schedule.capacityHintSession: Patients join the session and get a queue number with an estimated time — not an exact minute.
schedule.capacityHintSlot: Each slot is a real appointment time. Capacity is how many patients can be handled in the same slot.
schedule.capacityTypeHintStrict: Never exceeded — the last place is the last place.
schedule.capacityTypeHintComfort: May run over knowingly: the patient is told the wait is longer and chooses.
schedule.noBreaks: No breaks — slots run straight through.
schedule.holidaysDescription: Dates you are closed, overriding the week at every branch.
schedule.addHolidayDescription: Bookings can't be made on this date.
schedule.noHolidaysDescription: Add the dates you'll be closed so patients can't book them.
schedule.removeHolidayDescription: {date} will become bookable again if it falls on a working day.

calendar.descriptionAt: Working days, days off and holidays at {branch}
calendar.description: Working days, days off and holidays at a glance
calendar.capacitySession: {count, plural, one {# patient} other {# patients}} ({limit} limit)
calendar.capacitySlot: {count, plural, one {# place per slot} other {# places per slot}} ({limit} limit)

services.emptyDescription: Patients can't book you until you offer at least one service.
services.noPackagesDescription: Bundle several services together at a discount.
services.includedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No services included} one {# service included} other {# services included}}
services.deleteServiceDescription: Patients will no longer be able to book it. Existing bookings are unaffected.
services.deletePackageDescription: Patients will no longer be able to book this package.

serviceDialog.descriptionDoctor: Consultation types are what patients pick when they book you.
serviceDialog.descriptionLab: Patients book individual tests, or a package that includes them.
serviceDialog.descriptionRadiology: Patients book individual scans, or a package that includes them.
serviceDialog.bilingualHint: Patients read this in the language they browse in — both are required.
serviceDialog.priceHintClinical: A branch can price this differently — this is the default.
serviceDialog.contrastHint: A contrast agent is administered for this scan.
serviceDialog.acknowledgeTitle: The patient must acknowledge all of this
serviceDialog.acknowledgeBodyLab: Everything you set below is shown to the patient during booking, and they cannot complete the booking until they have confirmed they have read the preparation and that the profile they are booking for meets the rules. That is the point of it: nobody turns up un-fasted, and nobody books a test they cannot have.
serviceDialog.acknowledgeBodyRadiology: Everything you set below is shown to the patient during booking, and they cannot complete the booking until they have confirmed they have read the preparation and that the profile they are booking for meets the rules. That is the point of it: nobody turns up un-fasted, and nobody books a scan they cannot have.
serviceDialog.preparationHint: What the patient must do before they arrive.
serviceDialog.fastingHintLab: The patient must not eat before the test.
serviceDialog.fastingHintRadiology: The patient must not eat before the scan.
serviceDialog.medicationHint: One per line. Medicines to pause — or to keep taking. Keep both lists in the same order.
serviceDialog.medicationPlaceholder:
Stop metformin 48 hours before a contrast scan.
Pause biotin supplements for 48 hours.
serviceDialog.medicationPlaceholderAr:
أوقف الميتفورمين قبل الأشعة بالصبغة بـ 48 ساعة.
أوقف مكملات البيوتين لمدة 48 ساعة.
serviceDialog.arrivalHint: When to arrive and anything they must do on the day.
serviceDialog.arrivalPlaceholder: Arrive 30 minutes early. Leave all metal at home.
serviceDialog.arrivalPlaceholderAr: احضر قبل الموعد بـ 30 دقيقة. لا ترتدِ أي معادن.
serviceDialog.documentsHint: One per line. What the patient must bring with them. Keep both lists in the same order.
serviceDialog.documentsPlaceholder:
National ID
Doctor's referral
Previous imaging
serviceDialog.documentsPlaceholderAr:
بطاقة الرقم القومي
إحالة من الطبيب
أشعة سابقة
serviceDialog.eligibilityHintLab: Who may book this test. A profile that fails these rules is blocked from booking, and told why.
serviceDialog.eligibilityHintRadiology: Who may book this scan. A profile that fails these rules is blocked from booking, and told why.
serviceDialog.pregnancySafeHint: Turn this off for anything unsafe in pregnancy — ionising radiation, for instance. Pregnant profiles are then blocked from booking it.
serviceDialog.excludedHintLab: A profile carrying any of these cannot book this test.
serviceDialog.excludedHintRadiology: A profile carrying any of these cannot book this scan.
serviceDialog.activeHint: Inactive services are hidden from patients.

validation.name: Give this service a name.
validation.fastTooLong: A fast longer than a day isn't realistic.
validation.arrival: Tell the patient when to arrive and what to bring.
validation.fastingHours: Say how many hours they must fast.
validation.ageRange: The maximum age can't be below the minimum.

packageDialog.description: Bundle several services together at a discounted price.
packageDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: What's covered, and who it's for.
packageDialog.descriptionPlaceholderAr: ما الذي تشمله الباقة، ولمن هي موجّهة.
packageDialog.noServices: Add a service first — there's nothing to bundle yet.
packageDialog.activeHint: Inactive packages are hidden from patients.

reviews.showing: Showing {shown} of {total, plural, =0 {no reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}
reviews.emptyDescription: Reviews appear here once patients rate their completed visits.

replyDialog.title: Reply to review
replyDialog.description: Your reply is public and shown under the review.
replyDialog.label: Your reply

settings.profileDescription: This is what patients see on your listing and profile page.
settings.name: Name
settings.bioHint: Experience, sub-specialties, and what patients can expect. Patients read this in the language they browse in — both are required.

validation.name: Your name is too short.
validation.bio: Write at least a couple of sentences.
validation.bioArabic: Write at least a couple of sentences in Arabic.
validation.phone: Use an Egyptian mobile number, e.g. 01012345678.
